category_sources: Official Xiph documentation describes FLAC as a general purpose audio format and documents FLAC tools and APIs.
source_facts.description says FLAC is a free lossless audio codec.
display_name_sources: Official Xiph pages use FLAC as the project name.
docs_sources: Official Xiph FLAC documentation page links to tools, format specification, and API documentation.
repo_sources: Official Xiph developers page links Git access, issues, and pull requests on GitHub.
Official Xiph downloads page links to the development git repository on GitHub.
tags_sources: Official Xiph documentation covers the FLAC format, official command-line tools, and libFLAC APIs.
source_facts.description says Free lossless audio codec.
